architecture.summary: Bug fix: replace process.cwd() with resolveEffectiveRoot() in 3 call sites. No new architecture. Existing utility handles umbrella vs single-repo resolution.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal path resolution fix, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI internal bug fix, no UI

performance.summary: N/A - resolveEffectiveRoot() already used in 15+ call sites; negligible overhead from fs.existsSync walk-up

security.summary: N/A - path resolution only, no auth/data/input changes

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: (1) CWD is child repo in umbrella - primary fix scenario. (2) CWD is umbrella root - resolveEffectiveRoot returns same as process.cwd, no regression. (3) No .specweave found - fallback to process.cwd preserved. (4) platform.ts dedup must preserve same behavior for hook callers.
